creator: olivierd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 158618
Patch to update graphics/poppler and slaves ports

- Update to 0.34.0
- Remove CPPFLAGS, bug is now closed

Note: Still support graphics/openjpeg15, because if openjpeg1 and openjpeg2 (graphics/openjpeg) are present, first one is always used.
